# Ternary Diagram Representation

**Summary**: A graphical representation of a three-component system used to map phase behavior.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1987-fuseni|Fuseni, 1987]] applied ternary diagrams to map the phase regions of surfactant, brine, and oil systems.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Ternary diagrams at 20% salinity showed that B1083 produced a symmetric three-phase triangle, indicating good IFT lowering and efficient displacement. ([[1987-fuseni|Fuseni, 1987, p. 107]])
